description: Navigate to the install page at the target URL followed by /install.html

Verify the install page heading reads 'Install in 60 Seconds' and 8 agent selection cards are visible including Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code Copilot, Windsurf, Antigravity, Zed, Continue.dev, and Codex
Verify the install command text updates to include '--cursor' flag, showing 'npx ai-mind-map install --cursor' in the command box
Verify the install command text updates to show 'npx ai-mind-map install --gemini' reflecting the Antigravity agent selection
